subject: do not throw an exception when no relationship exists
commit_message:
do not throw an exception when no relationship exists

from vfmodule to vnfc

Issue-ID: SO-3369
Change-Id: Ia137384cbaa04fa014f865dd0eba14a7eca9605e
Signed-off-by: Kalkere Ramesh, Sharan (sk720x) <sk720x@att.com>
